//: Vendor-compile of the ORP reference. We compile ONLY core/ plus the four
//2: client/ files Orpal builds on (Client, ReliableChannel, SecureChannel, the
//3: WebRTC interface + MockWebRTC). The AGPL board/, the Node-only ws broker,
//4: and the werift adapter are deliberately excluded so they can never reach the
//5: shipped client. Output is consumed as built .js + .d.ts (skipLibCheck), so
//6: the reference is type-checked under ITS OWN settings, not Orpal's stricter
//7: ones. @noble is reused transitively (no second crypto stack).
